source_old_req: The BSCU component shall define internal state variables to track the initialization state and latch states of faults for each subcomponent (COM1/2 and MON1/2). The combinational logic shall enforce that, at any time, either no fault exists or at most one component fault occurs. Environmental assumptions shall specify that the system has at most one component failure, the Pedal input remains constant at 100, and the panel buttons LO, MED, and MAX are mutually exclusive. Additionally, the timing of key presses must satisfy specified envelope constraints for duration and interval. Guarantee statements shall ensure that, during non-initialization phases and under fault assumptions, at least one channel is in an error-free state, at least one channel is in an active state, and the overlapping time of dual-channel activation is less than 7 cycles. In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation layer, the system synchronization level shall be set to 2, the clock operation logic for each subcomponent shall be defined, and the implementation shall accurately map system-wide initialization determination conditions using structured assignment (assign). Verification lemmas shall be established to prove consistency between execution and monitoring commands, maximum sleep time constraints, and channel error traceability. Assertions shall constrain all components to remain in non-active and error-free states prior to system startup.
natural_requirement: The BSCU component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for BSCU.BSCU_Impl. In the implementation layer, BSCU.BSCU_Impl shall route signal flow from Panel to COM1.Panel through panel_to_COM1 and control signal from COM1.CMD to MON1.CMD_From_COM through COM1_to_MON1. Additionally, BSCU.BSCU_Impl shall use immediate communication timing on connection panel_to_COM1, use immediate communication timing on connection COM1_to_MON1, use immediate communication timing on connection pedal_to_COM1, and use immediate communication timing on connection fail_to_COM1.

requirement_items.text: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from Panel to COM1.Panel through connection panel_to_COM1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall declare connection panel_to_COM1 from Panel to COM1.Panel.

requirement_items.text: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall route the control signal from COM1.CMD to MON1.CMD_From_COM through connection COM1_to_MON1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall declare connection COM1_to_MON1 from COM1.CMD to MON1.CMD_From_COM.

requirement_items.text: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection panel_to_COM1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection panel_to_COM1 as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection COM1_to_MON1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection COM1_to_MON1 as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection pedal_to_COM1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection pedal_to_COM1 as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection fail_to_COM1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection fail_to_COM1 as immediate.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall declare connection panel_to_COM1 from Panel to COM1.Panel. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall declare connection COM1_to_MON1 from COM1.CMD to MON1.CMD_From_COM. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection panel_to_COM1 as immediate. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection COM1_to_MON1 as immediate. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection pedal_to_COM1 as immediate. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall assign Timing on connection fail_to_COM1 as immediate.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from Panel to COM1.Panel through connection panel_to_COM1. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall route the control signal from COM1.CMD to MON1.CMD_From_COM through connection COM1_to_MON1. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection panel_to_COM1. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection COM1_to_MON1. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection pedal_to_COM1. The BSCU.BSCU_Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection fail_to_COM1.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
